title: Cobblemon: Exodus
description: Fantasy and Pokemon, all in 1 Modpack!
body:
_The RPG adventure of your Pokemon dreams awaits!_

# **EXODUS: CHAPTER 2 PART 1 OUT NOW!:**

Enter a world full of new worlds to discover, new dungeons to fight, and battles to have! Gyms to fight, Worlds to conquer and thrive, **raids to end**, and so much more!


![Raid Den?](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04af527abdc38ee0c650bc8991ef495fc289e5b1.png)


# **COBBLEMON:**

Current mods that are in the game add in:
- **Megas as well as Legends Z-A Megas** ([Z-A Mega Crafting Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2V1Y86sc/images/5a96b098c5ddeb829b5639d47e96fbaa06069118.jpeg))
- **Z Crystals / Z-moves**
- **Dynamax & Gigantamax**
- **and Terastallization** 
  


Radical Trainers, Cobbreeding, Legendary Monuments, and Cobblemon Additions also are in this pack!

# **THE ADVENTURE:**

Embark on a wild adventure! Variety of mods have been added to ensure the journey exceeds expectations. We've done this by adding dungeons across the world, an astounding landscape (Created through mods like WWEE, Incendium, and Better End).

Its not over yet! We've made sure the playtime for this modpack is pushed to its limits. Additions such as Bosses of Mass Destructon, Multiple Ender eyes required to journey to the end, and even many new weapons, trinkets, and armors! This isn't just a Cobblemon journey, its an ever-expanding RPG!

# **QUALITY OF LIFE**

The Vanilla experience is great, but how about we go even further beyond? 3D Skin layers, Furniture, Updated 1st Person perspective and many more are all present!

**NOTE! Please get all the datapacks from the datapack folder and move them to the temp folder when creating a new world!**
